mapper.select: /* checkBizNo */ SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM company WHERE REPLACE(biz_no, '-', '') = REPLACE(#{bizNo}, '-', '') AND del_yn = 'N' )

/* selectCompanyById */ SELECT com.company_id, com.biz_no, com.company_nm, com.representative_nm, com.biz_type, com.biz_item , com.address, com.tel_no, com.fax_no, com.email, com.rmk, com.shipper_yn , com.region_cd, com.region_dtl_cd , com.manager_nm, com.manager_tel_no , com.reg_id, com.reg_dt, com.chg_id, com.chg_dt, com.del_yn , cdr.delivery_route_id FROM company com LEFT JOIN company_delivery_route cdr ON cdr.company_id = com.company_id AND cdr.del_yn = 'N' WHERE com.company_id = #{companyId}

/* selectInvoiceCompanyById */ SELECT com.company_id, com.biz_no, com.company_nm, com.representative_nm, com.biz_type, com.biz_item , com.address, com.tel_no, com.fax_no, com.email, com.rmk, com.shipper_yn , com.region_cd, com.region_dtl_cd , com.manager_nm, com.manager_tel_no , CASE WHEN shi.shipper_cd = 'COM' THEN shi.communication_fee ELSE 0 END AS communication_fee , CASE WHEN shi.shipper_cd = 'COM' THEN shi.communication_fee * 0.1 ELSE 0 END AS communication_fee_vat , CASE WHEN #{billCd} = '20' THEN to_char( ( (#{year} || '-' || #{month} || '-01')::date - INTERVAL '1 month' ) + INTERVAL '20 days', 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) ELSE to_char((#{year} || '-' || #{month} || '-01')::date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS startDate , CASE WHEN #{billCd} = '20' THEN to_char( ( (#{year} || '-' || #{month} || '-20')::date ), 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) ELSE to_char( ( ( (#{year} || '-' || #{month} || '-01')::date + INTERVAL '1 month' ) - INTERVAL '1 day' ), 'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS endDate , com.reg_id, com.reg_dt, com.chg_id, com.chg_dt, com.del_yn FROM company com LEFT JOIN shipper shi ON shi.company_id = com.company_id WHERE com.del_yn = 'N' AND com.company_id = #{calculationCompanyId}
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(1) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM company WHERE trim(company_nm) = trim(#{companyNm})

SELECT com.company_id, com.biz_no, com.company_nm, com.representative_nm, com.biz_type, com.biz_item , com.address, com.tel_no, com.fax_no, com.email, com.rmk, com.shipper_yn , com.region_cd, com.region_dtl_cd , com.manager_nm, com.manager_tel_no , com.reg_id, com.reg_dt, com.chg_id, com.chg_dt, com.del_yn FROM company com WHERE trim(company_nm) = trim(#{companyNm})
mapper.insert: /* insertCompany */ INSERT INTO company ( biz_no, company_nm, representative_nm, biz_type, biz_item, address, tel_no, fax_no, email, rmk, shipper_yn, region_cd, region_dtl_cd, manager_nm, manager_tel_no, reg_id, chg_id, del_yn ) VALUES ( REPLACE(#{param.bizNo},'-',''), #{param.companyNm}, #{param.representativeNm}, #{param.bizType}, #{param.bizItem}, #{param.address}, REPLACE(#{param.telNo},'-',''), REPLACE(#{param.faxNo},'-',''), #{param.email}, #{param.rmk}, #{param.shipperYn}, NULLIF (#{param.regionCd}, ''), NULLIF (#{param.regionDtlCd}, ''), #{param.managerNm}, REPLACE(#{param.managerTelNo},'-',''), #{memberInfo.memberId}, #{memberInfo.memberId}, #{param.delYn} )
mapper.update: /* updateCompany */ UPDATE company SET biz_no = REPLACE(#{param.bizNo},'-',''), company_nm = #{param.companyNm}, representative_nm = #{param.representativeNm}, biz_type = #{param.bizType}, biz_item = #{param.bizItem}, address = #{param.address}, tel_no = REPLACE(#{param.telNo},'-',''), fax_no = REPLACE(#{param.faxNo},'-',''), email = #{param.email}, rmk = #{param.rmk}, shipper_yn = #{param.shipperYn}, region_cd = NULLIF(#{param.regionCd}, ''), region_dtl_cd = NULLIF(#{param.regionDtlCd}, ''), manager_nm = #{param.managerNm}, manager_tel_no = REPLACE(#{param.managerTelNo},'-',''), chg_id = #{memberInfo.memberId}, chg_dt = now(), del_yn = #{param.delYn} WHERE company_id = #{param.companyId}
UPDATE company SET del_yn = 'Y', chg_id = #{memberInfo.memberId}, chg_dt = now() WHERE company_id = #{param.companyId}
mapper.delete: /* deleteCompanyById */ DELETE FROM company WHERE company_id = #{companyId}
